Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}You dipshits better watch yourselves. If we see your face around here too often, someone's gonna get hurt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}When you have that apathy thing, it's like you're too lazy to do anything, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}So what's the matter with them that they can't see a doctor?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I mean, I ain't never been to med school, but it's gotta be worth a try.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I guess it's all right to come here in your uniform if it's, like, after school or durin' the day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}But at night? You've gotta be shittin' me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Dude's gonna get knocked flat for dressing like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Y'might say it's in violation of our whaddayacallit, dress code. You better look out, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I heard people sayin' that dude is stronger than he looks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}He's a loner. His clothes are kinda old, but he's cool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}But man... Why would some Gekkou candy asses come here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Students should stay at home and do their homework or whatever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I couldn't give a crap about 'em.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Long as they don't start any shit, they're cool with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}The whole reason I hang out here is to shoot the shit with my buds.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Those three weirdos are the only ones who come here to try to learn stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}They need to get a life...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I thought that guy was a total loner... But he knows those weirdos?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Eh, like it matters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I don't give two shits 'bout who's friends with who.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Those assholes are just using us to gather info.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}They think we're some handy-dandy tool that'll give 'em the scoop any time they ask.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}There's somethin' wrong with those guys.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I can't even imagine what they do with themselves all day. Can you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Especially that long-haired freak. I think he, like, doesn't need anything but air to survive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Even though there's just two of 'em now, they're still nuts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Especially that long-haired freak! Guy pisses me the hell off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I ain't crazy about goin' under the needle, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}But you know how it is... I gotta have one, or else I'm chicken.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}So what I did was I got this sticker that looks just like a tat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}You tell anyone and I'll beat your ass, got it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Yo, this had NOTHIN' to do with us. Got it? We weren't even here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I know how it looks to guys like you on the outside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}But I don't give a shit about people if they just stay out of our faces.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Huh... I wonder what's in that case of his.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}He looks like the calmest dude out of the three of 'em. Don't ya think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Maybe he's more normal than I'm givin' him credit for.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Yeah... There probably ain't anything to worry about in his case.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}What was up with those guys?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}They come in, act like a buncha weirdos, and disappear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Yeah, dude, it's all about self-confidence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}But we don't gotta worry about them anymore. They're long gone, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Yeah, I know what he means... You can't go anywhere these days without seeing those weird flyers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}What's up with that shit?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}It doesn't look like any rival gang sign I know, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Some guys like to plan this stuff in advance... I don't even own a calendar, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}When we wanna do something, we do it. That's our holiday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}You gotta be free, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}It's fine if they wanna say, "Those who believe will be saved." Whatever.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}It bugs me, but at least I get what they're sayin'.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}But that weird sign they leave all over the damn place is different. It doesn't make any sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I saw that dude so often, I just thought of him as "that freak"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}But he's some kinda savior?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}And he's got a whole cult behind him!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Shit, dude... What the hell is everyone's problem?[n]{f 1 1}
